name: Nitrate sensor (NarL + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Detects nitrate in water and food. The native E. coli NarX/NarL nitrate two-component system gates a CRISPRa circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in safe E. coli K-12.

input.detects: Nitrate in drinking water, agricultural runoff, and cured foods

sensing.sensorMechanism: The NarX sensor kinase phosphorylates NarL in response to nitrate; phospho-NarL activates the nitrate-responsive Pnar promoter.
sensing.signalFlow: NO3- -> NarX/NarL activates Pnar -> transcribes an sgRNA -> dCas9-activator amplifies a weak reporter promoter (CRISPRa) -> green fluorescence rises with nitrate.

parts.name: NarX/NarL two-component system
parts.notes: Endogenous nitrate sensor; no porting needed in E. coli.

parts.name: Reporter-activating sgRNA
parts.source: designed upstream of a weak reporter promoter

performance.limitOfDetection: NarX/NarL module reports nitrate over µM-mM (module-validated).
performance.notes: Uses E. coli's native nitrate sensor (anaerobic/microaerobic induction); CRISPRa amplifier integration is a design template. Note Pnar is also FNR/oxygen-modulated.

safety.biocontainment: Lab/contained; add kill-switch for field use.
safety.notes: E. coli K-12 non-pathogenic BSL-1 host; relevant to drinking-water and food-safety nitrate limits.

buildSteps.title: Design CRISPRa sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target the activation window of a weak reporter promoter; verify host off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: Pnar -> sgRNA (NarX/NarL endogenous). TU2: dCas9-omega. TU3: weak promoter -> sfGFP.

buildSteps.title: Transform E. coli K-12
buildSteps.description: Select; confirm nitrate-dependent activation and low background.

buildSteps.title: Expose to sample
buildSteps.description: Incubate (micro-aerobically) with the sample + nitrate standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining E. coli's native NarX/NarL nitrate sensor with a dCas9 CRISPRa reporter
partsSources: Stewart 1993 / E. coli nar regulon literature (NarX/NarL nitrate sensing)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
